科技.title: The running list: major tech layoffs in 2026 where employers cited AI
科技.summary: A running look — in reverse chronological order — at the bigger tech companies that have announced significant layoffs this year with AI as a stated factor.

科技.title: OpenAI launches new initiative to help find and patch open-source bugs
科技.summary: OpenAI is attempting to tackle the security issues of the open source software community.

科技.title: Tesla pushes back on Autopilot narrative after fatal Texas crash
科技.summary: Whether the Autopilot system was truly active, overridden, or malfunctioning likely won't be resolved until investigators finish combing through the vehicle's data logs.

科技.title: Shareholders sue Uber’s board over sexual assaults, other incidents
科技.summary: The lawsuit, led by a Detroit pension fund, alleges Uber's board and management has cut too many compliance corners, resulting in thousands of lawsuits.

科技.title: The AI world is getting ‘loopy’
科技.summary: The loop takes agentic AI a step further by authorizing a swarm of agents to work continuously in the background, endlessly.

科技.title: Microsoft and Chevron plan one of the largest gas-powered data center projects in US
科技.summary: Microsoft inked a 20-year power purchase agreement with Chevron, locking in decades of carbon emissions from a new natural gas power plant.

科技.title: AI chipmaker Groq confirms $650M raise, re-staffs after Nvidia’s $20B not-acqui-hire deal
科技.summary: What does an AI company do after one of those not-acqui-hire deals? Groq raised money, is leaning into its neocloud business, and is hiring new execs.

科技.title: Nvidia wants to cut data center water use, but that’s not the same as fixing AI’s water problem
科技.summary: Nvidia announced a new cooling system that cuts water use inside the data center. But it does nothing to address AI's biggest water use — fossil fuel power plants.

科技.title: Tata Electronics, a major tech supplier to Apple and Tesla, confirms data breach
科技.summary: The incident comes as Tata Electronics expands its role in global technology supply chains.

科技.title: A new unpatchable flaw in Apple chips opens the door to an iPhone jailbreak
科技.summary: European offensive cybersecurity company Paradigm Shift released details of a flaw and a technique to exploit it that opens the door for hackers to unlock and break into older iPhones.

科技.title: Google DeepMind bets $75M on AI’s future in Hollywood with A24 deal
科技.summary: Google DeepMind and A24 are teaming up to build AI filmmaking tools.

科技.title: Anthropic says Claude may want to see your ID
科技.summary: Claude's chatbot may ask to verify your age and identity "in certain circumstances," such as with a passport or driver's license, according to a privacy policy change.

科技.title: Amazon is testing Alexa+ in India with Hindi support
科技.summary: Amazon is planning to increase the footprint of its new conversational AI assistant Alexa+ to India and is inviting users in the country to test out a Hindi-language version.

科技.title: SpaceX inks compute deal with Reflection AI, an open source AI lab
科技.summary: Reflection AI will pay $150 million a month beginning July 1, 2026 through 2029 for immediate access to Nvidia's latest GB300 AI chips and supporting hardware across SpaceX's Colossus 2 data center near Memphis, Tennessee.

科技.title: WhatsApp gets new chief as Meta taps India’s CRED founder Kunal Shah and invests $900M in startup
科技.summary: WhatsApp gets a new boss, as Will Cathcart moves to a new role at Meta, while Shah steps down as CEO of Indian fintech giant CRED to replace Cathcart.
